title: Iran Threatens to Strike Beyond the Middle East if the U.S. Resumes Attacks
summary_full: The warning was issued as President Trump and Vice President JD Vance say progress is being made toward a deal, while keeping open the threat of renewed strikes.
summary_public: The warning was issued as President Trump and Vice President JD Vance say progress is being made toward a deal, while keeping open the threat of renewed strikes.
